task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to the Cape Hatteras Lighthouse area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on the North Carolina coast, specifically the Cape Hatteras point (approx 35.25°N, 75.53°W).

task_completion.description: Agent creates a placemark named 'Cape Hatteras Light'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark properties dialog or sidebar entry visible with the name 'Cape Hatteras Light'.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the specific description details to the lighthouse placemark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Placemark properties dialog showing the text 'Height: 64m, Nominal Range: 20nm' in the description field.

task_completion.description: Agent measures 20 nautical miles due East from the lighthouse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ruler tool or measurement line visible on map extending East (approx 90 degrees) with a length reading near 20nm or 37km.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the '20nm Visibility Limit' placemark at the measured endpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second placemark named '20nm Visibility Limit' visible on the map, located at the end of the measurement line to the right (East) of the lighthouse.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the placemarks to the specified KML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window showing the filename 'cape_hatteras_visibility.kml' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the GUI of a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a mapping software interface (menus, map view, dialogs) rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent determines the location via measurement tools, not by pasting coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ruler tool or a measurement line is visible on screen before or during the creation of the second placemark.

integrity.description: Agent does not generate the KML file using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of using command line tools like `echo`, `cat`, or scripts to generate the .kml file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Cape Hatteras Lighthouse is located at 35.2512°N, 75.5282°W. 20 nautical miles is equivalent to 37.04 kilometers. Due East corresponds to a heading of 90 degrees.
